_comment: Registry for Thailand Runner Rank. Curate this with the admin page rank-admin.html (edit → download → commit → run: node scripts/build-rank.js). The Checkrace timing DB is always the base; 'checkraceExclude' hides specific Checkrace event codes. 'externalEvents' adds standard events NOT in the Checkrace DB by timing system + public event id. Do NOT add Checkrace's own events to externalEvents or finishers double-count.
